modules.NyxAI: Core reasoning engine, handles planning and execution.
modules.FrostShell: Sentient terminal interface with predictive insights.
modules.MemoryEngine: Persistent behavioral logging and pattern detection.
modules.RuntimeController: Central event-driven brain coordinating OS layers.

command_context.nyx mode: Switches the system persona (calm, assistive, autonomous, developer).
command_context.nyx explain: Explains the logic behind the last system decision.
